Communication Resources & Social Media 
Sept. 24, 2025 
Purpose 
Get digital resources for social media, websites, and communication campaigns.
How to use these resources 
Promote STI prevention, test, treatment, and anti-stigma messaging to your audiences with the following ready-to-use resources.
Many of the web and social graphics for X (formerly known as Twitter), Facebook, and Instagram contain sample social media messages in the captions.
Follow Us 
You can also follow CDC STD on Facebook and X for additional content CDC STD Facebook
